Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags
species:wikidata and species:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because species:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q156944 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Bergahorn to de:Berg-Ahorn
an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q753853 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Lamas (Tiergattung) to de:Lamas (Gattung)
Lamas - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q156944 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Bergahorn to de:Berg-Ahorn
an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q156944 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Bergahorn to de:Berg-Ahorn
an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q156944 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Bergahorn to de:Berg-Ahorn
an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(9936147176)['species:wikidata'='Q156944']['species:wikipedia'='de:Bergahorn']; way(1013882814)['species:wikidata'='Q753853']['species:wikipedia'='de:Lamas (Tiergattung)']; way(1151068671)['species:wikidata'='Q156944']['species:wikipedia'='de:Bergahorn']; way(1151068672)['species:wikidata'='Q156944']['species:wikipedia'='de:Bergahorn']; way(1151342203)['species:wikidata'='Q156944']['species:wikipedia'='de:Bergahorn']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for species prefixed tags']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for name:etymology prefixed tags
name:etymology:wikidata and name:etymology:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because name:etymology:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q91836 vs (missing) article redirects from de:Max Hirsch (Politiker) to de:Max Hirsch (Publizist)
Max-Hirsch-Straße - an affected OSM element that may be improved
